citations: Saez (2004) optimal taxation / ETI framework
Gruber and Saez (2002) ETI estimates

runs.reasoningSummary: My prior is that medium-run ETI for top U.S. earners is moderate: real responses are meaningful, avoidance and timing matter, and the combined elasticity is usually below 1 but often above 0.3.
